title: Add your business
description: With your business's SIREN/SIRET number, we automatically retrieve the necessary information to create the account.
fallback: Don't have a SIREN/SIRET yet? Create a Personal account that you can later switch to a Business account.
search_suggestion: There are too many results, please narrow down your search.
search_not_satisfactory: Can't find your business? Add it manually
description_corporation: With your company's SIRET number, we automatically retrieve the necessary information to create the account.
description_association: With your association's SIRET number, we automatically retrieve the necessary information to create the account.
description_administration: With your administration's SIRET number, we automatically retrieve the necessary information to create the account.
